description_long: This object is a compact, double-barreled shotgun with a classic side-by-side barrel configuration. The barrels are short and finished in a dark, matte metal, with no visible ribbing or venting. The receiver and trigger guard are metallic, with a subtle texture that contrasts with the smooth, polished wooden grip and fore-end. The grip is ergonomically curved, made from a rich, reddish-brown wood, and there is no full stock, only a pistol-style grip. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a single visible trigger. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a dark metal finish and a polished wooden pistol grip. The design is robust and lacks a full stock, emphasizing portability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden pistol grip, metallic receiver, and short, double barrels.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the twin barrel openings and the dark, matte finish of the barrels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the wooden grip and the double barrels, with the trigger guard and receiver visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wooden grip and the alignment of the barrels, with the metallic receiver partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, short length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
